positive: A breathtaking, highly detailed mandala illustration featuring entwined celestial motifs and bioluminescent flora. The composition should be perfectly symmetrical and centered, suitable for a repeating print pattern. Elements include stylized crescent moons, twinkling star fields, iridescent ferns, and flowing nebula clouds, rendered in a clean line art style with strong, saturated jewel tones (deep indigo, sapphire blue, emerald green, and gold leaf accents). Utilize a crisp, graphic silhouette aesthetic with smooth gradients and stark contrast against a clean background. Intricate, geometric, and highly decorative, evoking a mystical, dreamlike atmosphere. Zentangle inspired, vector art style, perfect for screen printing.
